businessContext_i18n.fr: Moment de flexion sur la poutre.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify calculations with FEA or physical testing.
Use appropriate safety factors for design.

description.short: Calculate maximum bending stress in a steel beam section.
description.long: Calculate maximum bending stress in a steel beam section.

short_i18n.en: Calculate maximum bending stress in a steel beam section.
short_i18n.tr: Celik profilin dis liflerindeki Maximum egilme (normal) gerilmesini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie die maximale Biegespannung in einem Stahlträgerquerschnitt.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la contrainte de flexion maximale dans une section de poutre en acier.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el esfuerzo máximo de flexión en una sección de viga de acero.
short_i18n.ar: احسب أقصى إجهاد انحناء في مقطع عارضة فولاذية.
